prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is B-201 Gauging & GD&T basics within 2.10 Assembly & Fabrication. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.2 Fitment & Tolerance. The observed field condition is: go/no-go misread (go doesn't go = undersize... reasoning item). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors ASME Y14.5 (basic), gauge instructions. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T5 B-201 Measurement & estimation
